1509500003.english: It looks like you’ve been captured.

1509500004.korean: 그렇다면 더 이상 부여 받은 임무를 수행은 무의미 합니다.
1509500004.english: Then there’s no point in continuing the assigned mission.

1509500005.korean: 현재 상황에 따른 위기 대응 매뉴얼도 입력된 바 없습니다.
1509500005.english: I have no crisis‑response protocol for the current situation.

1509500007.korean: 항상 어머니를 위한 최선의 행동을 선택하는 것.
1509500007.english: Choosing the best course of action for Mother, always.

1509500008.korean: 그렇다면 다음으로 제가 해야 하는 행동은…
1509500008.english: Then, the next thing I should do is…

1509500009.english: I’ll retrieve the data code and leave.

1509500011.english: It was nice meeting you, Orca members.

1509500012.english: I hope the day we meet again comes soon.
